problem: How to store solar energy at grid scale without chemical battery degradation?
hypothesis: Photonic bandgap manipulation in metamaterial may resolve How to store solar energy at grid scale without chemical battery degradation? by activating at the systems level.

experiment.protocol: Computational simulation with 9 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: We cannot solve problems with the same thinking that created them. — Einstein paraphrase
